textPlain: It included a link a Chinese forumUnfortunately the bulk of electronics repair and troubleshooting has drifted into the far East, and thus learning at least fragments of the language will help to find useful information on that part of the Internet. I've found that the Russian sites can also be very informative especially when it comes to identifying SMD part markings.

Very true. I’d like to add that it appears to be common on chinese sites to use micro-payment systems. You want the modified code / device driver / pinout / datasheet or rom dump? Please pay 3 cents.On the Russian fora I’m often hitting a wall with unfamiliar chip IDs in their schematics. But when looking up smd markings they often have a nice photo of the part in situ.
